project_type: C# .NET 8 AWS CDK infrastructure-as-code project for a sleep audio processing pipeline
language: C# (.NET 8 target, running on .NET 9 with RollForward), Python 3.12 (Lambda)
build_system: .NET SDK with dotnet CLI. No Dockerfile. Node.js required for CDK CLI. Uses mise for runtime management.
test_framework: xUnit for C# (serial execution via xunit.runner.json), pytest for Python Lambda tests
test_command: unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln' - must succeed. 2. Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal' - all 129+ tests must pass. 3. Run 'cd src/CdkBase/lambda/process_audio && python -m pytest test_index.py -v' - all 19 tests must pass. 4. Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx cdk synth' - must succeed.
setup_instructions: 1. pyenv global 3.12.13. 2. pip install pytest boto3. 3. dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln. 4. dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln. Tests require unset NODE_OPTIONS before running.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - NuGet and PyPI accessible. .NET 9 installed via mise (project targets net8.0 with RollForward:Major). Must unset NODE_OPTIONS before dotnet/npx commands. Tests must run serially due to JSII constraints.
contribution_requirements: TDD methodology - write failing tests first. All resources traceable to ARCHITECTURE.md. Must pass dotnet test and cdk synth for all environments.
key_patterns: CdkBaseStackTest creates a new App/Stack per test (inefficient). EndToEndValidationTest uses IClassFixture for shared synthesis. PipelineStackTest uses [Collection] for sequential execution. State machine assertions use serialized JSON string matching. Lambda tests use unittest.mock patching.
directory_structure: Root: cdk.json, README.md, docs/, src/. Under src/: CdkBase.sln, CdkBase/ (main CDK app with Program.cs, CdkBaseStack.cs, PipelineStack.cs, lambda/), CdkBase.Tests/ (xUnit test project with 3 test classes).
